---
title: "PEH Data Platform – User Guidance"
---

## What is the PEH Data Platform?

The **PEH Data Platform** supports the preparation, inspection and harmonisation of data related to **Population Environmental Health (PEH)** studies.

The platform is designed to:
- support structured data submission
- improve consistency with agreed codebooks and templates
- increase transparency in data processing steps

It is intended for **researchers and data managers**, not for software developers.

::: callout-note
This website provides **user guidance only**.  
The PEH Data Platform does **not store personal data** via this documentation site.
:::

---

## Who is this guidance for?

- Partners contributing data to PEH‑related studies or platforms  
- Researchers working with standardised questionnaires or templates  
- Data managers responsible for data quality and documentation  

No programming knowledge is required to use the platform.

---

## What you will find here

- **Getting started** – what you need before first use  
- **User guide** – detailed explanations of inputs, workflows and outputs  
- **Limitations and governance** – assumptions, scope and responsibilities  

Use the navigation to explore the documentation.

---

## Citation

If you use the PEH Data Platform in your work, please cite:

> *PEH Data Platform*. Version X.Y.  
> Organization, Year.  
> DOI: `https://doi.org/xxxxx`
